heroSubtitle: Scale Street delivers healthcare-focused AI training, from general literacy to Microsoft-certified courses and hands-on ambient documentation. Webinars, workshops, and coaching designed for your organization.
challengeDescription: Healthcare organizations know they need AI, but most teams haven't been trained to use it. The gap between potential and adoption is a skills gap, and that's exactly what we solve.
challengeBottomText: Scale Street was built to close that gap.

trainingFocuses.title: Build AI skills
trainingFocuses.description: From leadership to frontline staff, we help your team understand what AI can do, how to use it responsibly, and where it fits in their work.
trainingFocuses.checklistDescription: Flexible training formats that meet your team where they are, virtual or in-person.

trainingFocuses.title: Microsoft-certified
trainingFocuses.description: Official Microsoft AI courses for users, admins, and builders. Certification-aligned training developed in partnership with Microsoft.
trainingFocuses.checklistDescription: From end-user adoption to M365 administration to building custom Copilot solutions.

trainingFocuses.title: Train your clinicians on
trainingFocuses.description: Hands-on training for the tools transforming clinical documentation: Nuance DAX and Sunio by eClinicalWorks.
trainingFocuses.checklistDescription: Onboarding, workflow optimization, and adoption coaching for ambient clinical documentation.

credentials.title: Professionals Trained
credentials.description: Delivered 50+ training sessions consistently rated the best technical training participants have ever attended.

credentials.title: Providers Onboarded
credentials.description: Deployed ambient documentation (Nuance DAX) across multi-site Emergency Departments with hands-on clinician training.

credentials.title: University of Georgia
credentials.description: Faculty in the UGA Master of Health Administration program, teaching Health Informatics and connecting training to the next generation of healthcare leaders.

credentials.title: Microsoft Certified Trainer
credentials.description: Official Microsoft curriculum developed and delivered by a Microsoft Certified Trainer with deep healthcare experience.

ctaSubtitle: Let's talk about which training fits your organization.
